PowerShell($r = curl.exe -s "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=wolf%20growl%20snarl&srnamespace=6&format=json&srlimit=15" | ConvertFrom-Json; $r.query.search | ForEach-Object { $_.title }; Write-Output "---howl---"; $r2 = curl.exe -s "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=wolf%20howl%20ogg&srnamespace=6&format=json&srlimit=15" | ConvertFrom-Json; $r2.query.search | ForEach-Object { $_.title })

PowerShell($r = curl.exe -s "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&titles=File:Wolf%20howls.ogg&prop=imageinfo&iiprop=url%7Csize%7Cextmetadata&format=json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $pages = $r.query.pages.PSObject.Properties.Value; $ii = $pages.imageinfo[0]; Write-Output "url: $\($ii.url\)"; Write-Output "size: $\($ii.size\)"; Write-Output "license: $\($ii.extmetadata.LicenseShortName.value\)"; Write-Output "duration-ish: $\($ii.extmetadata.ObjectName.value\)")
PowerShell($ff = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ff\) { Write-Output "ffmpeg: $\($ff.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "no ffmpeg" })

PowerShell($dst = "C:\\Users\\asali\\Projects\\MMO\\game\\assets\\sounds"; curl.exe -sL -o "$dst\\roar_fangmaw.ogg" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/87/Wolf_howls.ogg"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$dst\\roar_fangmaw.ogg"\)[0..3]; Write-Output "sig: $\(-join \($b | ForEach-Object {[char]$_}\)\) size: $\(\(Get-Item "$dst\\roar_fangmaw.ogg"\).Length\)"; Remove-Item "$dst\\fireball.wav" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; echo "fireball.wav removed \(synth fwoosh takes over\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($page in @\("https://opengameart.org/content/5-chiptunes-action", "https://opengameart.org/content/4-chiptunes-adventure"\)\) { $html = curl.exe -sL $page; Write-Output "=== $page ==="; \($html | Select-String -Pattern 'href="\(https://opengameart\\.org/sites/default/files/[^"]+\\.\(zip|ogg|mp3|wav\)\)"' -AllMatches\).Matches | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Select-Object -Unique -First 8 })

PowerShell($scratch = "C:\\Users\\asali\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-asali-Projects-MMO\\48ac82c7-bc37-4e4c-bbd1-f04efe35a960\\scratchpad"; curl.exe -sL -o "$scratch\\mus_action.zip" "https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/5%20Action%20Chiptunes%20By%20Juhani%20Junkala.zip"; curl.exe -sL -o "$scratch\\mus_adv.zip" "https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/Juhani%20Junkala%20%5BChiptune%20Adventures%5D%20OGG.zip"; Expand-Archive -Force "$scratch\\mus_action.zip" "$scratch\\mus_action"; Expand-Archive -Force "$scratch\\mus_adv.zip" "$scratch\\mus_adv"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "$scratch\\mus_action", "$scratch\\mus_adv" | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".ogg", ".wav", ".mp3" } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\)  \($\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)\) MB\)" })

PowerShell($scratch = "C:\\Users\\asali\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-asali-Projects-MMO\\48ac82c7-bc37-4e4c-bbd1-f04efe35a960\\scratchpad"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\asali\\Projects\\MMO\\game\\assets\\music"; $map = @{ "magma.wav" = "Level 3.wav"; "rainstorm.wav" = "Level 2.wav"; "icefield.wav" = "Ending.wav"; "holy.wav" = "Title Screen.wav"; "desert.ogg" = "Stage 1.ogg"; "graveyard.ogg" = "Stage 2.ogg"; "crystalline.ogg" = "Stage Select.ogg" }; $all = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "$scratch\\mus_action", "$scratch\\mus_adv"; foreach \($k in $map.Keys\) { $src = $all | Where-Object { $_.Name.EndsWith\($map[$k]\) } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($src\) { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src.FullName -Destination "$dst\\$k" -Force } }; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})
